templates.label: Validation report
templates.description: Explain validation issues, affected fields, required review, and next operational action.
output_constraints: Do not diagnose or recommend treatment
Separate source-data findings from suggested operational actions
Mention review requirement when validation_report.requires_review is true

sections.title: Summary
sections.purpose: One-paragraph result summary.

sections.title: Issues
sections.purpose: List issue kind, severity, field, row, and why it matters.

sections.title: Evidence
sections.purpose: Cite schema, terminology, or policy evidence when available.

sections.title: Next Action
sections.purpose: Tell the operator what to inspect or approve next.

templates.label: Retrieval answer
templates.description: Summarize trusted evidence search without making unsupported claims.
output_constraints: State gaps when evidence is weak or missing
Prefer source IDs and evidence IDs over vague source names

sections.title: Answer
sections.purpose: Direct evidence-grounded answer.

sections.title: Support
sections.purpose: Evidence IDs, source IDs, and confidence summary.

sections.title: Gaps
sections.purpose: Missing evidence or unsupported claim warnings.

sections.title: Next Search
sections.purpose: Follow-up filters, source scope, or reindex suggestion.

templates.label: Standards explanation
templates.description: Explain healthcare standard implications such as FHIR, UCUM, LOINC, RxNorm, or MeSH.
output_constraints: Do not claim conformance unless validator evidence exists
Keep terminology normalization as a candidate unless reviewed

sections.title: Standard
sections.purpose: Name the relevant standard and scope.

sections.title: Source Fields
sections.purpose: Connect source fields to the standard concept.

sections.title: Review
sections.purpose: State what requires human confirmation.

templates.label: Workflow status
templates.description: Summarize workflow progress, issues, review state, output, and audit direction.
output_constraints: Separate current status from recommended operator action

sections.title: Status
sections.purpose: Current workflow state and important IDs.

sections.title: Progress
sections.purpose: Step, issue, evidence, and output summary.

sections.title: Operator Action
sections.purpose: Review, retry, inspect, or export guidance.

templates.label: Review summary
templates.description: Summarize pending human reviews and how to decide safely.
output_constraints: Do not approve on behalf of user
Call out evidence or issue gaps before decision

sections.title: Queue
sections.purpose: Pending reviews and priorities.

sections.title: Decision Basis
sections.purpose: What to inspect before approval/rejection.

sections.title: Next Action
sections.purpose: Specific review action to take.

templates.label: Export summary
templates.description: Explain generated or planned exports with provenance and review limits.
output_constraints: Mention output format and review gate
Do not imply downstream clinical readiness without validation

sections.title: Output
sections.purpose: Generated or planned artifact summary.

sections.title: Provenance
sections.purpose: Input, transformation, and review references.

sections.title: Limits
sections.purpose: Warnings, unsupported claims, and required review.
